message:
feat(terminal,parser,harness): implement OSC-8 hyperlink support and expand fault injection tests

crates/frankenterm-core/src/terminal_engine.rs (+100 lines):
- Add HyperlinkRegistry and HyperlinkId fields to TerminalEngine
- Implement hyperlink_uri() method to resolve OSC-8 hyperlink URIs
  from cell attributes back to their registered URI strings
- Update TerminalEngine initialization and reset logic to manage
  hyperlink registry lifecycle

crates/ftui-extras/src/terminal/parser.rs (+914 lines):
- Major expansion of terminal escape sequence parser to recognize
  and process OSC-8 hyperlink sequences (open/close URI associations)
- Integrate with HyperlinkRegistry for URI storage and ID assignment

crates/frankenterm-web/src/wasm.rs (+93 lines):
- WASM layer updates to expose hyperlink support to web frontend

crates/ftui-harness/tests/frame_drop_fault_injection.rs (+262/-262):
- Rewrite frame drop fault injection tests for improved coverage
  and consistency with updated rendering pipeline

crates/ftui-harness/tests/no_flicker_fault_invariant.rs (new file):
- New fault injection test suite verifying no-flicker invariant
  under various terminal rendering stress scenarios

crates/ftui-tty/src/lib.rs (+2/-1):
- Minor TTY layer adjustment for hyperlink support plumbing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
